name: Cape of the Mountebank
overview: A cape smelling faintly of brimstone that grants teleportation abilities.

properties.spell_casting: While wearing it, you can use it to cast Dimension Door as a Magic action
properties.recharge: This property can't be used again until the next dawn

effect.description: When you teleport with that spell, you leave behind a cloud of smoke
effect.obscurement: The space you left is Lightly Obscured by that smoke until the end of your next turn
